ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a reference to Zacconi`s affiliation to the Incauti Academy see Francesco Zacconi, Discorso academico della vita, e della morte del Beato Andrea Avellino, Naples, Francesco Savio, 1636.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
